title: Gloxinia velutina
taxonomy: Gloxinia velutina is classified in the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or Gesneriad family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which includes other flowering plant families such as Acanthaceae and Lamiaceae. The order Lamiales is further classified under the clade Asterids, which is one of the two main groups of flowering plants. The clade Asterids is a subset of the larger group called Angiosperms, or flowering plants. The classification of Gloxinia velutina reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.

Further studies are needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal uses and potential benefits.
